import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { ArrowRight, Shield, Heart, PawPrint } from 'lucide-react'; import { images } from '../assets/images'; export default function LandingPage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
{/* Hero Section with Animal Rescue Image */}
Emergency Rescue Platform

RescuePaw

Connect injured animals with nearby rescuers in real-time. Report, track, and save lives.

{/* Role Section with Images */}

How can you help?

{/* Reporter Card */}

I am a Reporter

Spotted an injured animal? Report with GPS location and photo proof. Nearby rescuers get instant alerts and you can track rescue progress in real-time.

{/* Volunteer Card */}

I am a Rescuer

Receive real-time rescue alerts within 5km. Accept missions, navigate to the location, and update status. Make a difference in your community.

); }
